pkg/framework/entutils/testutils/ent2/sc.purpose: Test-only Ent schema fixture for the entutils test harness (ent2 database). Provides a second distinct Ent schema used to validate multi-database transaction helpers without touching production schemas.

patterns.name: Embed ent.Schema
patterns.description: Every schema struct must embed ent.Schema as its first field.

patterns.name: Use entutils.TimeMixin
patterns.description: All schema structs must include entutils.TimeMixin{} in their Mixin() return to get created_at/updated_at fields consistently.

patterns.name: Immutable string ID
patterns.description: The primary key field is a string named 'id', marked Unique() and Immutable().

patterns.name: Return empty slices for unused schema hooks
patterns.description: Indexes() and Edges() must return empty slices rather than nil when unused.

key_file_guides.role: Defines the Example2 Ent schema entity used as the second fixture schema in entutils multi-db transaction tests.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add real business logic or relations here; this is a minimal test fixture. Adding edges or complex fields will change the generated test DB schema and break entutils tests.

anti_patterns: Adding production domain fields or edges to test fixture schemas
Omitting entutils.TimeMixin from Mixin() — breaks consistency with production schema conventions
Using a non-string or mutable ID field — violates the project-wide ID convention
Importing domain packages (openmeter/billing, openmeter/customer, etc.) into this test schema

decisions.decision: Separate ent2 schema from ent1 schema in testutils
decisions.rationale: entutils transaction helpers must be tested against two independent Ent databases to verify cross-db transaction isolation; using a distinct schema package avoids collision with the ent1 fixture.

decisions.decision: Minimal schema with only id and one value field
decisions.rationale: Test fixtures should be as small as possible to keep generated test DB migrations fast and to avoid coupling entutils tests to domain schema evolution.

code_examples.scenario: Define a new test entity in this schema package
